name: SYS 02 — Outbound Lead Outreach Sequence
description: Multi-touch outbound sequence triggered by webhook at /enroll-outreach. Sends Touch 1 email, waits per CONFIG, Touch 2 email, optional SMS; uses owner/company from CONFIG and logs each touch to the Automations Log.

parameters.content:
## SYS 02 — Outbound Lead Outreach Sequence

**Trigger:** Webhook POST at `/enroll-outreach` (e.g. when a lead is enrolled from **SYS 01 — Lead Sourcing Machine**, **SYS 01 — AI Voice Lead Qualification**, or **SYS 01 — Website Form Lead Intake** after a HubSpot form submission).

**What it does:** Runs a multi-touch sequence: Touch 1 email (intro), then waits CONFIG's follow-up delay; Touch 2 email (value); optional Touch 3 SMS. All messaging uses owner and company info from CONFIG. Logs each touch to the Automations Log.

**Dependencies:** CONFIG, Send Email, Send SMS, Log. Update HubSpot outreach/replied flags as needed.

**Dependencies:** CONFIG, Send Email, Send SMS, Log. Update HubSpot outreach/replied flags as needed.
